programme.title: Chris Williamson

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.desc: How will acting legend Drew Barrymore, who has over 70 film and TV credits to her name, handle hot sauces?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Dave Grohl Makes a New Friend While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Rock legend Dave Grohl takes on the wings of death and discusses the best drummers of all time, the art of the cover song and why doing "Hot Ones" has been on his bucket list.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: DJ Snake Reveals His Human Side While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: You might not recognize DJ Snake walking down the street, but once you hear his discography, the lights go.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Anthony Mackie Quotes Shakespeare While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Mackie takes on the wings of death and drops knowledge about authentic New Orleans food, the rap bonafides of William Shakespeare and why Best Supporting Actor is the most coveted Academy Award.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Tom Segura Tears Up While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Eventually, Segura ends up with tears streaming from his eyes but is it the hot sauce or the tender words from BFF Bert Kreischer? Find out in this scorching new episode of "Hot Ones."

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Elijah Wood Tastes the Lava of Mount Doom While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Elijah Wood is the star of one of the highest-grossing franchises of all time, "The Lord of the Rings."

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Paul Rudd Does a Historic Dab While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: One of the nicest dudes in Hollywood takes on some of the least nice hot sauces on the planet. Paul Rudd breaks down the alternate "Anchorman" script, shares his love for David Letterman and improvises a tearful scene inspired by the wings of death.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Adam Richman Impersonates Noel Gallagher While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: A dear friend of "Hot Ones," Adam Richman, takes on the sauces and wings while discussing his top five iconic Brooklyn eating establishments, the influence of WWII on how Americans eat today, urban gardening tips and his favorite food rap lyrics.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Tenacious D Gets Rocked By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The Greatest Band in the World goes wing for wing with Sean Evans. Along they way, the comedic duo discusses everything from Jack's infamous Dorito Burrito to Kanye West to their animated YouTube series.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Vanessa Hudgens Does Tongue Twisters While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Vanessa Hudgens is a megastar known for "High School Musical" and roles in cult movies like "Spring Breakers."

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Lorde Drops the Mic While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: New Zealand pop powerhouse Lorde takes on the wings of death and discusses the sound of cicadas, the art of songwriting and the keys to a perfect onion ring.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Cara Delevingne Shows Her Hot Sauce Balls While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Supermodel and actress Cara Delevingne is the first brave soul to take on the brand new hot sauce lineup.

programme.title: Mrs Henderson Presents
programme.desc: 1937. Mrs Henderson, a woman of wealth and connections, has just buried her beloved husband. And now she's bored. Friends suggest she finds a hobby and to their amazement she buys the Windmill theatre. When business dips she comes up with a new idea to get the crowds back - put naked girls on stage! But when the government threatens to shut the theatre Mrs Henderson's fighting spirit is revealed.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon finds nearly £50,000 but Tracey forbids using it. Dorien gets stopped at the bank.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey and Dorien get caught up in romantic tangles. Garth and Marcie plan a pop-up restaurant.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Proctor finds herself forced to implement divisive directives from the Home Office.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: The team finds it hard to prevent personal matters from creeping into their professional lives.

programme.title: Kid Sister
programme.desc: Lulu invents a Jewish boyfriend to appease her parents before sneaking out to see her real, non-Jewish boyfriend. A UTI sends her to the doctor where she receives startling news.

programme.title: Kid Sister
programme.desc: Lulu comes clean to her brother Leo and suggests a possible solution to both their problems. But Leo wants nothing to do with her unhinged proposition.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Ashley, the luckiest woman around, swaps fortunes with down-and-out Jake.

programme.title: Josh Pugh: Live From Birmingham Town Hall
programme.desc: Josh Pugh performs his award nominated stand up show in front of a sold out Birmingham Town Hall on the final night of his first nationwide tour. A show about the last two years, trying for a baby and losing Captain Tom's Birthday Cards.

programme.title: Kid Rigs Raffle To Win
programme.desc: Mikey, a mischievous teen, cheats in a Tesla raffle to win a car for Noah's struggling dad. His elaborate schemes unravel when his mom exposes his dishonesty, leading to a surprising twist where Noah wins, and Mikey loses his coveted Christmas gift.

programme.title: Deaf Girl Told She Can't Sing
programme.desc: Mia, a vocal major, is diagnosed with a rare condition causing progressive hearing loss. Devastated, she leaves music, but her mom helps her find a new way to "feel" music. Mia auditions for AGT, captivating audiences, and earns a record deal.

programme.title: Kid Gets World's Strictest Family
programme.desc: Sasha, a rebellious teen, is sent to her aunt and uncle's mansion for a "vacation" to learn discipline. Tricked into babysitting her conniving cousin Pearl, Sasha faces escalating pranks and blackmail, ultimately leading to a chaotic party and a shocking twist.

programme.title: Teen & Grandma Swap Lives For 1 Week
programme.desc: Teen Rosie and Grandma Louise swap lives for a week. Rosie navigates assisted living's challenges while Louise endures high school bullying. They uncover betrayal and embrace empathy, learning that understanding others' struggles fosters open hearts.

programme.title: Girl Goes Undercover On Boys' Basketball Team
programme.desc: Scrawny Joel, an unexpected basketball hero, and his athletic sister Rachel, trade places to navigate high school, basketball, and social challenges. Their scheme, filled with hilarious mishaps, ultimately leads to self-discovery and triumph on and off the court.

programme.title: Girls Mom Goes Undercover In High School
programme.desc: Overprotective mom Carol secretly enrolls in her daughter Nicole's high school to shield her from bullies. Her disguise and interventions cause chaos, exposing family secrets and school corruption, ultimately empowering Nicole to stand up for herself.

programme.title: Friends Live In Viral Prank House
programme.desc: Jason, a prank-obsessed YouTuber, creates chaos for his friends with elaborate pranks. After his friends retaliate with an epic prank that costs him a dream deal, Jason learns a valuable lesson about empathy, only to discover their prank was a setup for his biggest success yet.

programme.title: From Janitor To Company CEO
programme.desc: Ricky, a high school dropout and former drug dealer, faces his father's constant disapproval. Given a second chance at a janitorial job, he creates a revolutionary chip flavor, rising to COO and finally earning his father's pride.

programme.title: Poor Student Hides Being Genius
programme.desc: A scholarship student, Ryan, faces bullying for his poverty and struggles with dyslexia. Secretly tutored by a kind security guard, Ryan excels in math, earns respect, and later uses his success to uplift his family and help his mentor reunite with his estranged son.

programme.title: Teen Builds Home Out Of Toys
programme.desc: Cody, is belittled by his family for his passion for Legos. He leaves home and teams up with his best friend, Jacob, to build a full-size Lego house and document the process for his YouTube channel. The video goes viral, bringing him success and showing his father the value of his hobby.

programme.title: Genius And Jock Regret Wish
programme.desc: After wishing to switch lives, a bullied genius and a struggling jock swap bodies. They gain empathy for each other's struggles—bullying, family pressure, and learning differences—ultimately realizing their self-worth and becoming unlikely friends.

programme.desc: Ryan Gosling finds a unique way to try British and Canadian snacks, sharing some hilarious opinions on British classics and having a great time eating a Tunnocks tea cake! programme.title: Snack Wars

The Good, The Bad & The Rugby podcast hosts settle the Marmite vs Vegemite debate, sip on Earl Grey tea and sample Lambrini.

programme.title: Snack Wars: Episode 26
programme.desc: Korean band TOMORROW X TOGETHER compares British and Korean food in this episode of Snack Wars! Soobin and Beomgyu make a mess opening Turtle Chips, Yeonjun loves British noodles, Kai rates Irn Bru, and Taehyun adores Monster Munch! Henry Golding joins us for the ultimate British vs Malaysian snacks battle. He tries iconic treats from both countries, shares why durian fruit is banned in parts of Asia, and raves about his favourite Malaysian Mamee noodles.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Niall Horan compares Irish and British snacks and has an incredible time pouring the PERFECT pint of Guinness and recounts a hilarious story involving Lewis Capaldi and Buckfast!

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: The wonderful Sister Gabriel answers the questions you've always wanted to ask a nun, explaining her commitment to a 'cloistered' life and the surprising career path she had beforehand, while reflecting on a life of celibacy.

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: In this episode, we're joined by the legendary Professor Brian Cox to tackle your biggest questions about the universe. From the best evidence for alien life to the possibility of time travel, Brian unpacks some of science's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Honesty Box
programme.desc: Ed reveals the most extreme thing he's done to survive, the most disgusting things he's eaten, and his most dangerous moments walking the Amazon. He also gives great survival tips and tells you why he would never drink Thames water!

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this week's episode, ex-career criminal John Burton, a.k.a 'Juice Bomb John', recounts how he began a life of crime in the 90's Liverpool rave scene, smuggled millions of pounds worth of black market goods into the UK, and reformed to develop an app helping people find work after leaving the prison system.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we sat down with former spy Paul Hughes who gives us an insight into his varied life tracking terrorists in the Middle East and on counter-terror operations in the UK. We hear about his dangerous mission to find Osama bin Laden in Afghanistan after 9/11. Paul explains the tactics used by terrorist groups like al-Qaeda and the Taliban hiding in the mountains, as well as his terrifying experience of coming face to face with Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: John Massey, at one point England's longest-serving prisoner, spent an astonishing 43 years behind bars. John candidly shares his life story with us, including the murder that led him to prison, his four daring escapes, and his eventual release.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we sit down with Sebastian Junger, a renowned journalist and filmmaker who has spent over 20 years documenting life on the front lines in war zones. Sebastian shares stories from his career in Bosnia, Afghanistan, and Liberia, recounting the most shocking events he's witnessed and delving into the ethical dilemmas faced by war journalists. He also reflects on the profound impact of a near-death experience he had in 2020, offering insights into how it has reshaped his perspective on life and work.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Downfall and Liberation

programme.title: Signs of Evil
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS, Hitler's Schutzstaffel, stands for terror and the murder of millions. The penniless graphic artist Walter Heck was given the job of designing the jagged, rune-like characters in 1929. The “sig” rune was rooted deep in the ideological cosmos of the Nazis and their supporters. They saw themselves as the descendants of the Teutons and declared the runes to be humanity's original Germanic script. The symbol was meant to unite Heinrich Himmler's “Black Order.” But did it escape their notice that it was originally of Semitic origin? In October 1945, the Allies passed a law banning the Nazi Party and all associated organizations, including the SS. The young Federal Republic even forbade all Nazi symbols. This documentary tells the gripping story of the SS symbol, from the Middle Ages to the present day.

programme.title: The East

programme.title: Invisible Impacts
programme.desc: Join host Nick Uhas and his guests as they shine a light on the unseen science behind our everyday lives. This week's experiments explore the resonant frequencies of bridges and human bodies.

programme.title: Water, Water Everywhere
programme.desc: Join host Nick Uhas and his guests as they dive deep into the wonderful world of water. In this week's experiments we discover how water can start a fire, transform breakfast cereal into a magnetic field detector, and even change the way you visualize the world around you.

programme.title: Magnificent Mixtures
programme.desc: Join host Nick Uhas and his guests as they amalgamate in the name of science. In this week's experiments we mix up some fireworks made from tin foil, whip up a stinky polymer, and try out an alchemy staple - turning lead into gold.

programme.title: Up and Atom
programme.desc: Join host Nick Uhas and his guests as they break open the atomic bonds that connect our world. This week's experiments blow open the science behind creating a glowing pickle, how forensic teams extract DNA, and how acids can transform simple household items to their core.

programme.title: Hot Hot Heat
programme.desc: Join host Nick Uhas and his guests as they turn up the thermostat and discover the role heat plays in science. This week's experiments investigate how to send secret messages with heat.

programme.title: Explosive Elements
programme.desc: Join host Nick Uhas and his guests discover the unstable world of elemental gasses. This week's experiments include recreating a big bang with lithium, the incendiary power of methane, and how a little bit of liquified nitrogen can lend a lot of power to a rocket.

programme.title: Colorful Conundrums
programme.desc: Join host Nick Uhas and his guests as they taste the scientific rainbow. This week's experiments highlight how electricity can tint titanium, how you can create a color wheel by lighting things on fire, and why the world gets all its colors from white light.

programme.title: Don't Believe Your Eyes
programme.desc: Join host Nick Uhas and his guests as they make science look like sorcery. This week's experiments delve into the possibilities of mind control, why objects and people tend to sync together, and the magical mysteries behind magnesium.

programme.title: The Sound of Science
programme.desc: Join host Nick Uhas and his guests as they tune into the science behind sound. This week's experiments hit high notes as we discover the physics of theremins, investigate how the outer ear impacts human hearing, and put on a laser show with cymatics.

programme.title: Science on Fire
programme.desc: Join host Nick Uhas and his guests as they kindle our curiosity about the science behind fire. This week's experiments investigate how you can burn metal using only a 9 volt battery, what fire can teach us about calories, and why a little bit of sodium can cause a gigantic explosion.

programme.title: Destination Wild
programme.desc: The Western Ghats are amongst some of the most biodiverse regions in the world, and these mountains are the ancestral birthplace for many of India's endemic species. This episode delves into India's jungle heart, and the mysterious forests nestled in the shadow of the Western Ghats' great peaks.

programme.title: Destination Wild
programme.desc: This is the story of an awe-inspiring land of extremes. From the cold and fearsome waters of Tierra Del Fuego and the Antarctic Peninsula to the frozen Patagonian steppe, we follow the animals living on the very edge of existence, having to survive is some of the most extreme environments on earth. King Penguins court on the windswept coast leopard seals hunt amongst the ice floes and young pumas take their first steps toward independence is this South American final Frontier.

programme.title: Destination Wild
programme.desc: Chile is at the mercy of weather systems that have shaped the nation. In the South, strong westerlies bring rains that create rich green Valdivian forests, carpeting the neotropic ecozone. The Valdivian forests of Chile are a unique ecosystem harbouring species of a ‘land before time' – The forests of Valdivia represent the unique assemblage of ancient species, both floral and faunal, which today persist as relicts of Gondwanaland.

programme.title: Destination Wild
programme.desc: Chile is a ribbon of land trapped by natural borders. At its Northern edge, the driest desert in the world cuts off the country from the rest of South America. Here, in the Atacama desert, wildlife has spent millions of years adapting to a life without water. Those that survive have learnt that no opportunity comes without its fair share of risk, but for the animals of the Atacama, only those that dare, will make it in the most unforgiving desert on Earth.

programme.title: Cheetah: Beating the Odds
programme.desc: A cheetah raises her young family on the vast expanse of the Serengeti. If her cubs are going to survive, she'll have to overcome a barrage of challenges. Lions, gangsters of the plains, are quick to throw their muscle around, whilst hyenas and jackals attempt to steal anything the cheetah manage to kill. The cheetah will have to learn the hunting skills their mother has perfected. Once they've learnt the ropes, they'll make their own way across the plains, establishing territory and having cubs of their own.

programme.title: Destination Wild
programme.desc: Compared to the rest of the subcontinent the North East of India remains largely untouched and unexplored. Steeped in mystery and folklore, this land is a remote and beautiful sanctuary.

programme.title: Destination Wild
programme.desc: The Western Ghats are amongst some of the most biodiverse regions in the world, and these mountains are the ancestral birthplace for many of India's endemic species. This episode delves into India's jungle heart, and the mysterious forests nestled in the shadow of the Western Ghats' great peaks.

programme.title: Destination Wild
programme.desc: This is the story of an awe-inspiring land of extremes. From the cold and fearsome waters of Tierra Del Fuego and the Antarctic Peninsula to the frozen Patagonian steppe, we follow the animals living on the very edge of existence, having to survive is some of the most extreme environments on earth. King Penguins court on the windswept coast leopard seals hunt amongst the ice floes and young pumas take their first steps toward independence is this South American final Frontier.

programme.title: Raising Wildlife
programme.desc: Rhino horn is more valuable than gold and more recent increases in poaching leaves the survival of this species at risk. Every day a rhino monitoring team at Somkhanda Game Reserve keeps track of a rhino and her calf, but skilful tracking and telemetry don't guarantee that they'll find them. When it comes to their milk feed, the competition is fierce for four orphaned baby dassies at Daktari Wildlife Orphanage. Their care taker forms strong bonds with the animals he looks after and decides to visit the rocky outcrop where he's released a dassie – can he find his friend? A baby porcupine is hand-reared at Tenikwa Wildlife and Rehabilitation Centre. Can his surrogate mom teach him to forage otherwise they won't be able to release him back in the wild.

programme.title: Raising Wildlife
programme.desc: Raising wildlife can be a long-term commitment: elephant calves are dependent on their mothers for three years and chimpanzees rely on special attention for about seven. In this episode, we visit the Lilayi Elephant Nursery in Zambia and the Mefou Primate Park in Cameroon to meet the highly committed people who take on this responsibility. Night or day, a baby elephant can never be left alone and many of the chimpanzee orphans arrive highly traumatised. Their care givers need to work very hard to restore their trust and will to live. At the Kwaggasvlaktes Wildlife Centre in South Africa some baby Wildebeest rely on heart-warming help from humans and an unusual sheep to survive.

programme.title: Wild Bavaria
programme.desc: The moon disappears behind the horizon and the stage is set for a new day in the Alps of Berchtesgaden.

programme.title: Wild Bavaria
programme.desc: Mighty and mysterious, King Watzmann sits above Germany's only alpine national park.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The first episode of this two-part nature documentary presents the natural beauty of the shifting sand dunes of the Curonian Spit, the romantic beaches of the Latvian Baltic Sea and the island worlds of Estonia. Time and again, this deserted and almost untouched nature fascinates. In the winter, ringed seals give birth to their young on the pack ice. In the spring, Konik wild horse stallions fight fierce battles amongst themselves, while colourful European rollers fly through the dune forests. Lynxes wander through the coastal forests and in the orchid meadows turncoats and hoopoes find more than enough food. On the islands around Saaremaa in Estonia, grey seals hunt for fish. They share the archipelago with Europe's largest tern, the Caspian tern.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake. Europe's widest waterfall is located in Latvia. In the beginning of May, vimba bream follow the course of the River Venta. The hardly 5-centimetre-long fish have to overcome a 4-metre-long rock barrier in order to reach their spawning grounds.

programme.title: The Moor

programme.title: Bosnia Herzegovina
programme.desc: Wild and unknown lies the still undiscovered natural paradise of Bosnia and Herzegovina in the heart of Europe. Rough mountains, dense forests and wild waterfalls characterize the picture of the untouched landscapes. Lynx, wolves and bears roam mountains and valleys. One of the last primeval forests in Europe is a retreat for many endangered animal species. Bosnia and Herzegovina is actually an undiscovered natural paradise in the middle of Europe.

programme.title: Amazing Iran
programme.desc: For the Iranian Turkmen a wedding is one of most important social events in their culture and is still celebrated according to old nomadic tradition. The Turkmen Steppe, the country of a thousand mountains, is a tribute to the hidden treasure that is Iran. Home to a proud nation with a majestic history, we show the freedom of a nomadic life, encounter the wild nature of the people and discover old traditions like the Turkmen wedding. Breathtaking sceneries create a mysticism that transports viewers into the realm of divinity while exposing a world caught between tradition and modernity - nomadism and sedentarism. Weddings in Iran are primarily arrangements between families and the product of lengthy negotiations. Even though many customs are purely symbolic, they still reflect the great significance as a rite of transition for the newlyweds and their families. The life of the Turkmen housewife revolves around weddings – first her own, later those of her children. Raising healthy, capable daughters and sons searching for possible partners mediating contact negotiating each betrothal with the family of the intended shouldering the wedding arrangements and the observance of customs and traditions – the responsibility for all of that falls to the mother. Though the Turkmen daughters and sons of today do insist on having their say, love, affection, trust and the like are still not the decisive criteria in making a match. The main consideration is not the subjective happiness of the couple but the happiness, stability and honor of each of their families as a whole. So it is still not uncommon for the bride and groom to be virtual strangers on their wedding day. The nuptials as a ritual of transition mark a series of profound changes – especially in the life of the bride. Once married, she leaves her family and her home village to take her new place within the family of the groom.

programme.title: Beyond The Beaten Path

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.desc: Vietnam offers travelers a wide range of exotic as well as simple homegrown grub. Sashi rolls into town with no knowledge of Vietnamese cuisine, and he gets an indepth street food 101 tour of the city. From learning about haute Franco-Vietnamese cuisine with the city's best French chefs, to a simple and honest bowl of pho. In this episode, Sashi uncovers the bustling city of Hanoi and all its trappings. Secret alleyways leading to decades old cafes offering famous brews like egg coffee to iconic places that serve French style baguettes and everything in between!

programme.title: Intelligent Future
programme.desc: The world's smartest cities are built on an audacious blend of creativity, investment and foresight. As Abu Dhabi redesigns itself, we discover how transformative technologies are reshaping the way cities work, move, and sustain themselves. Becky Anderson explores the innovations driving her home's rise on the global Smart City Index,. We go behind the scenes for the launch of the latest version of TAMM, the world's first transactional AI servant streamlining 1,100 public services, explore Presight's smart city systems, and visit Masdar City, where new technologies like VOLT's home energy storage are powering a sustainable future.

programme.title: Inside Africa
programme.desc: As part of Inside Africa's 25th anniversary, we have a sit-down between two of the continent's most celebrated voices: Angelique Kidjo and Lupita Nyong'o. The setting is The Met's newly reimagined Arts of Africa gallery, a powerful space in which to reflect on African creativity, identity, and legacy. Five-time Grammy award winning Kidjo and Oscar-winning actor Nyong'o reflect on their careers and the rise and influence of African culture across the world.

programme.title: African Voices Playmakers
programme.desc: Larry Madowo meets two trailblazing women redefining strength and resilience. Somali-born boxer Ramla Ali rose from refugee to Olympic athlete and advocate, using her platform to empower women worldwide. In Lagos, Nigerian police officer Juliet Ukah breaks barriers as the first African woman signed to the Professional Fighters League, proving that true warriors fight for more than victory.

programme.title: Inside Africa
programme.desc: Namibia's breathtaking landscapes draw travelers from around the world, but beyond its iconic desert landscapes and wildlife lies a new story of culinary and winemaking excellence. Through Wilderness Safari's pioneering hospitality and training initiatives, Neuras' award-winning wines, and the rise of visionary young chefs, Namibia is blending sustainability, culture, and innovation to redefine world-class wining and dining.

programme.title: Marketplace Africa
programme.desc: Despite poor road infrastructure, massive traffic congestion, water transportation across the abundant waterways of Lagos, Nigeria is still underutilized. Now, renewed push to develop the region's waterways has seen a growth in passenger ferrires as well as a partnership with the international boat racing franchise E1. E1 is also looking to grow their presence on the continent through digital education and outreach. We take a look at the challenges and opportunities of tapping into the region's blue economy Aspen Global CEO Samer Kassem sits down to discuss the biopharmaceutical giant's growth and why he believes it's Africa's time to shine on a global stage when it comes to business.

programme.title: Marketplace Europe
programme.desc: The World Travel Market unites industry leaders to take on the biggest challenges and trends in global tourism. From AI and sustainability, to customer service and changing traveler demands, we speak to some of the key figures in European travel to find out how our vacations will evolve in the coming years.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The World's Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we've picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they'll be going all out against each other. It's now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let's start the action.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it's the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it's about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World's Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn't compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts it's the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it's going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don't, this is strongman champions league.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: On the menu this week it's medieval madness, we've come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world's strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.

programme.desc: Track List: Let's Love, Grey Suit, Hurdle, 1 to 3, Zero Gravity, Black Out, Back Again, Good Enough, Upside Down, Happy Accident (Feat. SOLE), Ocean Drive, 1 Billion Views (Feat. MOON), On Me (SEHUN Solo), Nothin' (CHANYEOL Solo), Telephone (Feat. 10CM), Closer to you, What a life, Just us 2 (Feat. Gaeko), FILM : KAI, Mmmh, Peaches, Rover, Adult Swim, Walls Don't Talk, Wait On Me

programme.title: U-KNOW 'I-KNOW' Spoiler Film
programme.desc: TVXQ! U-Know released a spy-style ‘I-KNOW' Spoiler Film to heighten anticipation for his upcoming comeback. Clues like word puzzles and coins, combined with the rhythm of “Body Language,” hint at the overall concept of the album.

programme.title: U-KNOW 'Body Language' MV
programme.desc: TVXQ! U-Know kicks off his first full-length album ‘I-KNOW' promotions with the pre-release of the new track “Body Language.” “Body Language” is a dance track blending blues, funk, and retro hip-hop, delivering a message of unity through dance. The music video artistically portrays villagers coming together through dance, with choreography by Vata of WeDemBoyz and RIEHATA of RIEHATOKYO. TVXQ! U-Know's lively vocals and performance amplify the song's upbeat and cheerful energy.

programme.title: U-KNOW 'Set In Stone' MV
programme.desc: The album opens with the intro track “Set In Stone,” an energetic pop song built around a powerful synthesizer riff. With its straightforward melody and strong rhythm, the track delivers Yunho's determination to “engrave the self I've preserved through doubt and confusion firmly in stone.”TVXQ's U-KNOW has completed his own musical world with his first full-length album, “I-KNOW.”

programme.title: U-KNOW 'Stretch' MV
programme.desc: The title track “Stretch” is a pop song characterized by its powerful electronic sound, with murmured vocals that create a striking contrast and deliver a sense of tension. Furthermore, the “Stretch” music video captures U-KNOW facing his inner shadow and engaging in a tense confrontation, portrayed through cinematic visuals and intense performance. It is also narratively connected to the previously released “Body Language” music video, adding greater depth and dimension to the world of this album.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Mood Sampler #1 | Chapter 1. How2getHearts
programme.desc: The group's vibrant visuals are paired with STELLA's captivating English narration.Hearts2Hearts' first mood sampler for their debut mini album 'FOCUS' features a rulebook concept video that shows how the members "earn hearts."

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Mood Sampler #2 | Chapter 2. Hard2Hide
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' second mood sampler for their debut mini album 'FOCUS' captures the members expressing the range of emotions experienced when falling in love, such as excitement, imagination, jealousy, sadness, and obsession.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Trailer
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' first mini album FOCUS features a total of six tracks, including the title track “FOCUS,” the single “STYLE,” and the pre-release song “Pretty Please,” showcasing a diverse musical palette. In the latter part of the video, the title track “FOCUS” audio and part of the choreography are revealed, raising anticipation for the new release.The album trailer captures the members' bold and free-spirited sides as they play around and dance together in a quiet space.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' MV
programme.desc: Its lyrics sensually express the feeling of being completely focused on someone, offering a fresh glimpse into Hearts2Hearts' unique appeal. Hearts2Hearts' first mini album title track “FOCUS” is a house genre-based song that features a vintage piano riff and an addictive melody, showcasing the group's cool and chic vocal charm. Set against a school backdrop, the music video delicately captures the complex emotions between the members. Choreographed by Jo Na-In, the performance delivers a sleek and sophisticated atmosphere.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' Trailer
programme.desc: It expresses the members' moments of anxiety, emptiness, and the intense emotions that arise amid their struggles, all captured through RIIZE's unique genre of “emotional pop.”Focusing on the unseen side of RIIZE's growth journey, the single features a total of three tracks, including the title track “Fame.” RIIZE's new single “Fame” is set to be released.

programme.title: NCT DREAM : They Were Here To Beat It Up Trailer
programme.desc: Centering on the theme of “the speed of time,” the album delivers a bold message that the members — who have been running toward their dreams since childhood — continue to grow, while confidently moving forward at their own pace and in their own way. NCT DREAM's 6th mini album “Beat It Up” consists of six tracks, including the title track of the same name, “Beat It Up.” The trailer “They Were Here To Beat It Up” wittily portrays NCT DREAM breaking through their limits and opening a new chapter of their own stage with surreal visuals and storytelling, powerfully setting the tone for the beginning of the new album.

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'Beat It Up' MV
programme.desc: The music video amps it up even more with a boxer concept, powerful moves, snappy cuts, and punch-heavy choreography that fires off the song's energy.The title track “Beat It Up” hits hard with bold kicks, heavy bass, and a vibe that's all about breaking limits with confidence. NCT DREAM's sixth mini album “Beat It Up” takes on the theme of 'the speed of time', sending a message that they're moving forward in their own pace and style.

programme.title: NCT 'NEO Tracks' Playlist
programme.desc: To the world NCT. Take a sonic dive into their neo world — bold experimental and unmistakably unique.

programme.title: Animal Sounds
programme.desc: This show blends fun and learning by introducing kids to a musical world where animals take center stage. With catchy tunes, children explore songs about pets and wildlife, fostering care and empathy while enjoying an universe of music and adventure!

programme.title: Let's Play Everyday
programme.desc: This show features nursery songs perfect for any moment, offering a fun and engaging soundtrack for kids' daily adventures. These entertaining and educational tunes captivate young audiences, sparking joy and learning, no matter the activity!

programme.title: Jump for Joy
programme.desc: This show helps kids develop motor skills with fun morning exercise songs, boosting health and happiness. The lively lyrics inspire kids and parents to stay active, making mornings a joyful and healthy start for the whole family!

programme.title: Good Morning, Sunshine!
programme.desc: This show teaches kids valuable habits through songs, guiding them through morning routines like waking up, brushing teeth, eating breakfast, and heading to kindergarten. It's a delightful blend of learning and fun!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two children are making Christmas crackers for each other. Dipsy is very pleased to find his present is a cracker. He looks for someone to pull the cracker. It makes a lovely pink bang and the Teletubbies laugh when they fall over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside. The Teletubbies follow it all over Teletubbyland, but where will is end up?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po's present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow. All the Teletubbies laugh as they play in the snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies crawl through the arch in Home Hill and watch Alex Pascall and some children sing 'Handy Hands'.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children play with balls of different shapes and sizes. In Teletubbyland, something happens to Dipsy's hat.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's time for the Teletubbies to do their exercises. A voice trumpet rises and the Teletubbies stretch up and down to it's instructions.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number two. Dipsy and Laa-Laa are eating Tubby Toast. They play the game 'Two Little Teletubbies', but while they are playing the Noo-Noo tidies up their Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take turns to stand on a hill, in front of the house, next to a tree under a cloud. Andy Brown and some children visit some giraffes. The animals march through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky calls the other Tubbies to come and watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story about the naughty sock. The Tubby Toast machine makes a tower of tubby toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children looking at penguins waddling and swimming. In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies play walk fast and slow, far and near and other different ways.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play 'Boo', but stop to watch Ned help his dad plant and water some geraniums. In Teletubbyland, nine pretty flowers and a watering can appear.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love playing on the slide. They stop to watch Andy Brown and some children digging in the sand for crabs.

programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Bester paints a portrait of Best for an upcoming Art Fair. To his horror, it looks nothing like him! Later, Best and Bester lose their last soccer ball.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Bester is recruiting as many people as possible for the Bettervale robostomp record attempt. Then, it's time for a longstanding Best and Bester tradition: finding the first woodpecker of spring.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: After a gruelling match of Chess-a-Pult, Best and Bester's levelled-up Chess game, Best's King goes missing. Convinced he'll do better than his sister, Best challenges Bester to an intelligence test!

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: In a case of mistaken identity, Best is suspected of being wanted as a notorious jewel thief! Later, Best and Bester discover the mysterious laundry disappearances are much more widespread...

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Determined to be the first Bettervale resident ever to go into space, Diamondo is preparing to launch his very own rocket ship. Later, a few harmless white lies spiral out of control...

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best finds a coveted special winning ticket for a private tour of Fritz Fritter's Donut Wonderland Factory! Later, Best and Bester unearth Captain Ironfoot's legendary Cursed Amulet!

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Inspired by the latest rom-com at the Bettervale Movie Theatre, Bester decides to go on a match-making mission! After Rocky kicks Toot out of their home, Best and Bester invite her to stay with them.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester are going on holiday but they transform too early and no longer look like their passport pictures! Later, Best decides to throw the "Employee of the Month" contest...

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: When Rocky accidentally swallows the last piece of Best and Bester's jigsaw puzzle, the twins are beside themselves! While looking for his sister's mobile phone, Best finds an overdue library book...

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Bester is super-excited for the first episode of the revival of her favourite soap opera "Animal Hearts". Later, Best and Bester are all set for their Triple M day (movie, milkshakes and mini-golf).

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: It's election day in Bettervale! Later, Best and Bester accidentally list their Sub as a hotel online and are surprised by a booking from Lottie Snott, the star of their favourite TV detective series!

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester set out to rejuvenate the flailing attraction, the Bettervale Sinkhole. Diamondo is used to getting everything he wants and today, he wants a sibling!

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester head to the department store to buy a new plate but are shocked by the price. Later, Best and Bester are appalled when Flip-Flop bans them from the Milkshake Café!

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best has won a competition to have a meeting to pitch some stories to the author of his favourite book series. Later, Best and Bester take over Rocky's house-sitting duties at Diamondo's mansion.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best has won a competition to have a meeting to pitch some stories to the author of his favourite book series. Later, Best and Bester take over Rocky's house-sitting duties at Diamondo's mansion.

programme.title: Andrea's Big Moment
programme.desc: When famous pop star Livi comes to Heartlake City to judge a talent show, our five friends Olivia, Mia, Andrea, Emma and Stephanie all decide to enter – and one of them, in particular, really wants to win but faces some serious challenge from an old rival. A talent show has come to Heartlake City and all the girls enter the talent competition hoping to impress the judges, especially their idol, pop star Chloe. No one wants a shot at stardom more than Andrea, which is why the other girls are surprised when she doesn't show up to practice before the first round of the competition. Very nearly eliminated prior to the big show, Andrea panics and throws herself into an intense practice-training mode, even shutting her friends out when they're trying to help her with her performance. Just moments before her live TV debut, Andrea realizes she's missing a key element to her act. Can she pull it off without her friends? And are the other girls willing to help after being pushed away?

programme.title: Kate's Island
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip, they meet the stand-offish Kate – but they soon realize that there's more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn't judge the book by its cover. No one is more excited than Olivia about science camp at a beautiful rocky offshore island with a lighthouse. But Olivia quickly gets off on the wrong foot with a mysterious girl named Kate who seems obsessed with a medallion necklace and the island's rumored history of pirates and treasure. Even worse for Olivia, Kate seems to be growing extra chummy with Mia, even sneaking around the island with her late at night. With the help of Stephanie, Emma and Andrea, Olivia is determined to get to the bottom of the girls' secret friendship and find out once and for all what they're searching for on the island, but they better not let Mrs. Stevens catch them out of their cabin past curfew.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids and are now forced to enlist Lloyd's help to battle the awakened monster. Tired of intense training, Lloyd yearns to play and enjoy his youth. The Ninja remind Lloyd that along with great power, comes great responsibility. When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and soon discover they've been turned into kids! Seeking Lloyd's help and relying on childhood antics, the five ninja kids must destroy the reawakened monster that's hunting them in the city. In the end, Lloyd makes the difficult decision and sacrifices his youth in order to save them from the beast, turning forward the clock and turning Lloyd into a young man. Sensei Wu fears now that since Lloyd is young man, the final battle of good versus evil approaches sooner than he had ever expected.

programme.title: The Surge
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd. Nowhere is safe but fortunately, the Ninja have been given the powerful Techno Blades. But the only problem is that they have no idea how to use them. Time has passed since the Ultimate Battle, and while the Golden Ninja continues to watch over Ninjago, the other Ninja have become complacent as schoolteachers. When a mysterious invitation from genius Cyrus Borg brings them to the futuristic New Ninjago City, trouble surges when a digital virus of the Overlord takes over technology. The Golden Ninja makes a heroic entrance, only to find out his Golden Power supercharges the enemy. Sensei Wu stays behind so that the Ninja can escape with the only thing that can save Ninjago's future – Borg's Techno Weapons.

programme.title: The Art Of The Silent Fist
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord's evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go. Their only chance is to learn the secrets of the Techno blades and use them to cut all power to save Ninjao from this technological menace. The Ninja hide out at a safe place void of technology – Sensei Garmadon's Sanctuary. That night, Zane is visited by Borg's female robo-assistant, Pixal. She warns them that the Digital Overlord is after Lloyd's Golden Power in order to become flesh, but the Techno Blades can reboot the system and erase him for good. After a highly advanced army of Nindroids attacks the Sanctuary, Lloyd flees with his father into the wilderness of Ninjago, while the rest set off on a quest to turn off all power in Ninjago, so that they can erase the Digital Overlord once and for all.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Peak Performance
programme.desc: The search for the Sandman leads Mateo and the others to the tallest mountain in the Dream World, but Lunia's hourglass puts a target on their backs.

programme.title: The Anomaly
programme.desc: A surprise visit from the Chief Inspector of the Night Bureau forces Mateo to hide Z-Blob, who goes on an adventure in the heart of Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Digiverse And Beyond, The Elemental Masters
programme.desc: Tackling a puzzle about technology in Ninjago. A riddle requires the Ninja to consider the powers and history of the Elemental Masters.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Andrea's Big Moment
programme.desc: When famous pop star Livi comes to Heartlake City to judge a talent show, our five friends Olivia, Mia, Andrea, Emma and Stephanie all decide to enter – and one of them, in particular, really wants to win but faces some serious challenge from an old rival. A talent show has come to Heartlake City and all the girls enter the talent competition hoping to impress the judges, especially their idol, pop star Chloe. No one wants a shot at stardom more than Andrea, which is why the other girls are surprised when she doesn't show up to practice before the first round of the competition. Very nearly eliminated prior to the big show, Andrea panics and throws herself into an intense practice-training mode, even shutting her friends out when they're trying to help her with her performance. Just moments before her live TV debut, Andrea realizes she's missing a key element to her act. Can she pull it off without her friends? And are the other girls willing to help after being pushed away?

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A crime lord and Cobra Commander trap Autobots in human bodies.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An accident causes the Dinobot Grimlock to become a super genius.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Technobots encounter a conniving smuggler.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Dinobots, Predacons, and Terrorcons suddenly desert their fellow Transformers.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons steal the Autobot Matrix of Leadership.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Cybertron Elite Guard arrives to retrieve the AllSpark but struggles to blend in on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime teams up with rival Sentinel Prime after a dangerous encounter with the Headmaster.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Elite Guard plans to take Prime and crew back to Cybertron, unaware of Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: AllSpark energy turns junk into a sentient robot, who ends up causing more harm than good.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hot Shot heads to Cybertron to warn Galvatron while battle rages on.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Thrust flees into Cybertron, chased by Hot Shot, Wheeljack, and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Thrust joins Sideways by passing through a portal underground.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Airachnid and Starscream ally for a weapon Starscream offers to join Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead holds synthetic Energon formula Decepticons close in.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Ratchet's experiment with synthetic Energon turns him into a threat to all.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Swapping Smurfs: In trying to avoid doing his chores, Lazy Smurf finds an old abandoned well with an interesting peculiarity: anything that goes down in the bucket comes back up in its original brand-new condition. But is it good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Viking: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's Marvelous Toy: It's been a few hundred years since Grandpa Smurf has seen this old toy… It was given to Papa Smurf long, long ago and he does not remember what it does. But Baby Smurf does know that it brings surprises for everyone!

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: Jokey's Medecine
programme.desc: Because of Jokey's pranks, none of the Smurfs believe him when he tells them that Azrael the cat is ready to pounce on them. Feeling guilty and responsible, he hurries to Gargamel's castle and plays some explosive jokes on the wizard and his cat so he can free his friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Royal Drum: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it… And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Snappy's Puppet: Snappy has a new trick: he frightens everybody, or tries to, with his hand-puppet dragon. But it gets, shall we say, out of hand when Papa Smurf's magic liquid falls on the puppet and it comes alive. Alive and kicking, what's more, endangering Snappy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby Smurf Is Missing: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing Out Of Time: None of the Smurfs seem to have time to play with the Smurflings. They go on a visit to Father Time and come across the River of Time, the great current that flows along majestically, carrying with it all the time in the world. And then an accident occurs, with untimely consequences...

programme.title: Tailor's Magic Needle
programme.desc: Tailor Smurf has to make an outfit for every Smurf before the Fall fashion show. Brainy Smurf wants to help him and, using Papa Smurf's book of Magic, he conjures up a magic needle that sews ten times faster than tailor... But is it really any good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Memory Melon: Selwyn and Tallulah are two powerful married wizards. The trouble is, they fight all the time. But the energy from their arguments is brewing up a dreadful storm and Papa has to get them to make up before the storm starts to rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf For Denisa: Balthazar brings Denisa to Gargamel to baby-sit. But Gargamel loses Denisa in the wood and she and Sassette meet and become friends. Sassette and Denisa work together to free the Smurfs from Gargamel's stewpot, and prove you don't have to be big to be brave.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Peewit's Unscrupulous Adventure: Peewit, the court jester, is the Smurfs' human friend. There is to be a celebration at the King's castle and Peewit good-humouredly invites his little blue friends to the feast. But they learn that the wicked chamberlain is pilfering the King's possessions.

programme.title: The Rabbids turn the city upside down.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get their hands on a remote-controlled car, and figure out how to use the controller.

programme.title: Rabbids experience.
programme.desc: In a laboratory, the Rabbids are subjected to tests designed to determine just how idiotic they really are.

programme.title: The Rabbids have a great plan.
programme.desc: Four rabbids find a wooden horse and tries to make it move by all means, while drawing Zak's attention.

programme.title: The Rabbids have to be cunning.
programme.desc: After his pals seemingly managed to reach the moon, a rabbid fins himself alone in the junkyard.

programme.title: The Rabbids invade the ice pack.
programme.desc: Mini Rabbid accidentally swaps places with a baby penguin.

programme.title: The Rabbids' Treasure Hunt.
programme.desc: An Explorer Rabbid heads off to the Ice floe in search of treasure.

programme.title: The Rabbids are in love.
programme.desc: A rabbid falls in love with the Teleporta-TV, enticed by the machine's incredible capacities.

programme.title: The Rabbids are fed up!
programme.desc: Amazed by a dog scratching himself, the Rabbids approach him, and get the dog's fleas.

programme.title: The Rabbids are moving.
programme.desc: A Rabbid has fun playing a game where he suddenly jumps out of a box to surprise his friends.

programme.title: The Rabbids are missing!
programme.desc: When a pilot rabbid disappears, a detective rabbid starts to investigate…

programme.title: The Rabbids make movies
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid decides to shoot a film singing his own praises.

programme.title: The Rabbids rebel.
programme.desc: Thanks to the Teleporta-TV, the rabbids lay hands on a voodoo doll with strange powers…

programme.title: The Rabbids aim for the moon!
programme.desc: The only way for rabbids to get into their rocket to reach the moon is to go on a drastic diet!

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part II
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina, but are unable to prevent Robotnik from roboti-sizing Uncle Chuck or from relegating the King to the Void. After they return to the present, Sonic laments that the trip was a waste, but Sally reminds him that they came close and they will keep trying until they do triumph over Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea-beast.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.sub-title: Who Do You Think You Are
programme.desc: Rumor has it that Queen Aleena's journals are buried in the city of Tashistan. Sonic and his siblings search the city for the scrolls.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.sub-title: A Hedgehog's Home Is Her Castle
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party. Envious of the attention Sonic's getting, especially from Sally, Antoine sets out on his own solo mission to prove his worth by capturing Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: SONIC X Satelite Swindle
