programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine
programme.desc: A group of middle-aged friends who are bored with their adult lives are transported back to their younger days in 1986 by a time-traveling hot tub.

programme.title: Maximum Truth
programme.desc: Comedy following political grifter Rick Klingman as he aims to take down a rival congressional candidate.

programme.title: Spree
programme.desc: Meet Kurt Kunkle, a 23-year-old rideshare driver so desperate for social media attention, he'll stop at nothing to go viral. Kurt comes up with a plan to broadcast a killing spree as a shortcut to infamy.

programme.title: Yours, Mine & Ours
programme.desc: Dennis Quaid and Rene Russo star in this delightful remake of the 1968 film of the same name. A widowed Coast Guard Admiral and a widowed handbag designer fall in love and marry, much to the dismay of her 10 and his 8 children.

programme.title: Broadcasting Christmas
programme.desc: When her broadcast partner decides to leave America's most popular morning show, Veronica Daniels announces that she will choose her new co-host from a handful of candidates, including Charlie Fisher, a local New York news anchor.

programme.title: Christmas Thieves
programme.desc: After two kids mistake burglars for babysitters, the thieves have to endure the children's hijinks as they make various absurd attempts to escape.

programme.title: Santa Claws
programme.desc: Tommy leaves his kittens out for Santa to take back to the North Pole, but after a major allergic reaction Santa can't deliver presents anymore, so the kittens have to deliver the rest of the presents to all the boys and girls.

programme.title: A Christmas Wedding Tail
programme.desc: A newlywed couples warring kids from past families look set to cause irreparable problems, until their loved-up pet pooches get involved.

programme.title: A Christmas Star
programme.desc: Born under the Christmas Star, Noelle believes she has the gift to perform miracles, so when conniving developer McKerrod threatens her peaceful life she and her friends determine to use this gift to thwart his plans.

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers
programme.desc: (2003) War drama with Corbin Allred. After a Nazi ambush leaves them trapped behind enemy lines, a small band of soldiers discover a secret that could change the war - if they can make it out alive...

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers: Airborne Creed
programme.desc: Three American paratroopers team up with resistance fighters in France to take on invading German army. Starring Corbin Allred and Jasen Wade (2012).

programme.title: WILD WIND
programme.desc: An allied commando unit is created to destroy a train loaded with Nazi soldiers during World War Two

programme.title: Alone We Fight
programme.desc: A small band of American solders in World War Two venture behind enemy lines to try and stop the German advance from breaking through the Allied lines. Starring Corbin Bernsen (2018)

programme.title: Hell River
programme.desc: (1974) Drama starring Rod Taylor and Adam West. Tensions build as partisans in Yugoslavia clash with Germans who invaded their homeland until the climactic battle at Hell River.

programme.title: Conan The Barbarian
programme.desc: The most legendary Barbarian of all time is back. A quest that begins as a personal vendetta for the fierce Cimmerian warrior soon turns into an epic battle against hulking rivals, horrific monsters, and impossible odds, as Conan realizes he is the only hope of saving the great nations of Hyboria.

programme.title: Don't Say A Word
programme.desc: When Dr. Nathan Conrad's daughter is kidnapped, a secret held by one of his catatonic patients may be his only hope.

programme.title: An American Werewolf in London
programme.desc: Two American college students in London are bitten by a wolf with terrifying results -- one is killed while the other begins to have nightmares and starts to receive visits from his mutilated friend's ghost.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Nothing Like the Holidays
programme.desc: The far-flung members of the Rodriguez family converge at their parents' home to face what may be their last Christmas together in this heart-warming holiday comedy.

programme.title: Brazil
programme.desc: A bureaucrat in a dystopic society becomes an enemy of the state, as he pursues the woman of his dreams.

programme.title: Brazil
programme.desc: A bureaucrat in a dystopic society becomes an enemy of the state, as he pursues the woman of his dreams.

programme.title: The Deal
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of an international finance deal in New York and Peru, Oliver's Deal is an intense political drama which explores how far people will go to get what they want.

programme.title: The Deal
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of an international finance deal in New York and Peru, Oliver's Deal is an intense political drama which explores how far people will go to get what they want.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Three young women vacationing in Paris, find themselves whisked away to Monte Carlo after one of them is mistaken for a British heiress.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Three young women vacationing in Paris, find themselves whisked away to Monte Carlo after one of them is mistaken for a British heiress.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate
programme.desc: A rare book dealer, while seeking out the last two copies of a demon text, gets drawn into a conspiracy with supernatural overtones. Starring: Johnny Depp, Frank Langella, Lena Olin

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Firehouse Dog
programme.desc: Hollywood's most pampered pooch gets lost during a commercial shoot and ends up as the mascot for a local fire station.

programme.title: The Fighter
programme.desc: A fledgling boxer tries to escape the shadow of his more famous but troubled older boxing brother.

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: Chronicles the courage and power of the people of Boston during the manhunt for the Boston Marathon bombers.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Two hardened criminals get into trouble with the US border patrol after meeting with a Mexican drug lord.

programme.title: The Fighter
programme.desc: A fledgling boxer tries to escape the shadow of his more famous but troubled older boxing brother.

programme.title: 3 Day Christmas
programme.desc: Martin Taylor has totally lost touch with his family. He has no clue who his teenage daughter's friends are, why his son only communicates with an electronic sign outside his bedroom door, or why his youngest child watches so much TV. Convinced the family needs to reconnect, Martin surprises the wife and kids with a little experiment-he locks them in their own home with no power, no heat, no running water, and absolutely no contact with the world outside! The sudden holiday staycation isn't what the Taylors had in mind for Christmas, but they'll have to team up to prove they can survive Dad's wacky mission and their wackier relatives. With a little planning and a whole lot of love, this just might turn into the best Taylor family Christmas yet!

programme.title: Christmas at the Ranch
programme.desc: When Haley Hollis returns to her family ranch, she wasn't banking on spending so much time with with ranch hand Kate - or falling for her.

programme.title: Miss Me This Christmas
programme.desc: Regina and Franklin are seemingly the perfect couple, but after five years of marriage, a huge fight at Thanksgiving leads them to divorce, set to be finalised on Christmas day. As they try to move on with their lives, will the festive spirit pull them back together? Starring Erica Ash (Scary Movie 5, Survivor's Remorse) and Eva Marcille (The Young and the Restless).

programme.title: Last Days in the Desert
programme.desc: As Jesus begins his journey out of the wilderness following forty days of fasting and praying, he struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis. This powerful drama depicting an imagined chapter from Jesus' life stars Golden Globe winner Ewan McGregor (Trainspotting, Star Wars franchise), Academy Award nominee Ciarn Hinds (Belfast, Game of Thrones), and Tye Sheridan (Mud, X-Men franchise).

programme.title: Christmas Ransom
programme.desc: In this festive comedy for the whole family, a pair of bumbling crooks break into a toy store on the verge of closing, and take the struggling owner hostage. Little do they know that two hideaway kids have also been locked in the store. With Christmas on the line, the kids team up with a heavily pregnant security officer in a series of hilarious and heartwarming escapades. Can they outwit the thieves and save both the store, and Christmas?

programme.title: Come to Daddy
programme.desc: Elijah Wood (The Lord of the Rings) stars in this critically acclaimed, genre-bending horror comedy thatll leave you shocked and in hysterics. After years of no contact, Norval (Wood) visits his estranged father (Stephen McHattie, Watchmen) and quickly discovers he has a shady past. Also starring Michael Smiley (Kill List) and Garfield Wilson (The Man in the High Castle).

programme.title: Mara
programme.desc: A twisted, spine-tingling horror based on the ancient legend of the night hag demon - Mara. Criminal psychologist Kate (Olga Kurylenko: Quantum of Solace) is assigned to the murder of a man who has seemingly been strangled in his sleep by his wife and the only witness is their daughter. As Kate investigates she experiences the same petrifying symptoms and spirals through a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: I Trapped The Devil
programme.desc: FrightFest Presents. When Matt (Youre Next icon AJ Bowen) and Karen (Southbounds Susan Burke) visit his estranged brother Steve (Scott Poythress) to celebrate Christmas, they are greeted with a horrifying surprise. Steve has trapped a man in his basement. Someone he believes to be none other than the devil himself. A clever and claustrophobic horror thriller that will keep you guessing.

programme.title: Blood Harvest
programme.desc: Hysteria, secrets, blame and judgement, it's time for a blood harvest. In an idyllic 1873 American Protestant village times are harsh and the grass is always greener on the other side. As the village suffers, one woman prospers and there are grumblings that she may be in league with the devil. Blood and secrets are shed and the cost of survival is revealed in this descent into the supernatural.

programme.title: The God Committee
programme.desc: Who lives, who dies? They decide. Three patients wait to see if they will live or die as a hospital committee decides to grant a life saving heart transplant to one of them. Years later the committee face the consequences of their decision. Starring Emmy Award winner Kelsey Grammer (Frasier) and Julia Stiles (Riviera), Janeane Garofalo (The Truth about Cats & Dogs) and Colman Domingo (Selma).

programme.title: 14 Love Letters
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Vanessa Sears. When mysterious love letters appear in her mailbox, a woman embarks on a heartfelt quest -finding love where she least expects it.

programme.title: Love By Accident
programme.desc: After breaking down on a road trip, a woman enlists the mechanic to be her fake boyfriend. Starring Henderson Wade (2020)

programme.title: Snapshot Of Love
programme.desc: Adrian is a Hollywood paparazzi assigned to get photos of a very elusive star, Parker Bennett. Little does she know, she'll get her chance when they both end up at the same BnB in the mountains of NC.

programme.title: This Little Love Of Mine
programme.desc: A workaholic lawyer returns to her island home to convince an old friend to take over his family's company - but rekindled feelings soon get in the way.

programme.title: Tell Me I Love You
programme.desc: Desperate for money, three best friends devise an outrageous plan to get married and inherit money from a trust fund. Starring Kaniehtiio Horn (2019)

programme.title: Smart People
programme.desc: A widowed professor (Dennis Quaid) experiences a new love and an unexpected visit from his adopted brother.

programme.title: Date & Switch
programme.desc: High school seniors Michael and Matty have been best friends since 3rd grade. Still virgins, they make a pact to help each other "score" before Senior Prom. But their mission takes an unexpected turn when Matty announces that he's gay.

programme.title: The Dreamers
programme.desc: The tumultuous political landscape of Paris in 1968 is the backdrop as three young cineastes are drawn together through their passion for film.

programme.title: Breaking Free
programme.desc: When a thirty-something 'suit' breaks into a music festival to retrieve his stolen belongings, he ends up finding love and freedom instead.

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: Retreat to Paradise

Though he struggles to learn to use his arm again, his attitude leaves Ellie wanting to leave him in his misery. But as they get to know each other more, Jordan starts to see Ellie is exactly who he wants in his life, and hopes Ellie feels the same way.

programme.title: It's a Fixer Upper

programme.title: Love Finds You In Charm

programme.desc: In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall. Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.

programme.title: Best Mistake 1 : The Movie
programme.desc: Kim Yeon Do (Lee Eun Jae) is a studious high school girl whose life is being made miserable by a boy from her past. Despite all of her efforts, she can't get peace as he won't leave her alone. So she hatches a plan. On her social media pages, she posts a picture of another boy, in the hope that this move will put an end to the irritation. But this move turns out to have unexpected consequences: It turns out that the boy in the picture is actually one of her schoolmates. Named Ji Hyun Ho (Kang Yul), he is a bit of a loose cannon. Although he is very popular, he dislikes studying - and prefers play. The rest of the school soon learns about the social media post, as news spreads fast in the classroom! This leads to a number of run-ins with ji Hyun Ho. But the more they get to know one another, the closer they get - causing yet further complications for a whole host of classmates!
